---
id: build-bitrise-yml-show
title: "Get the bitrise.yml of a build"
description: "Get the bitrise.yml file of one of the builds of a given app. This will return the `bitrise.yml` configuration with which the build ran. You can compare it to [the current bitrise.yml configuration](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/application/app-config-datastore-show) of the app."
sidebar_label: "Get the bitrise.yml of a build"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the bitrise.yml of a build"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/builds/{build-slug}/bitrise.yml"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the bitrise.yml file of one of the builds of a given app. This will return the `bitrise.yml` configuration with which the build ran. You can compare it to [the current bitrise.yml configuration](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/application/app-config-datastore-show) of the app.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./build-bitrise-yml-show.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./build-bitrise-yml-show.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
